content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Scaling Apps to Fix Debugging Roadblocks
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with unfixable bugs. Learn to scale your apps efficiently using Antigravity and Claude Code in this intermediate guide for AI builders.
content.answer_block: Debugging failures often stem from monolithic spaghetti code that resists isolation. To solve this, refactor your architecture into modular, service-oriented components. By leveraging Antigravity for structural analysis and Claude Code for automated iterative testing, you can systematically isolate, patch, and scale your application logic without manual overhead.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your terminal is bleeding red errors that defy logic. You are stuck in the 'debugging purgatory'—that moment where a codebase has grown too complex to reason about, and every fix seems to break three other features. It is the silent killer of freelance profit margins and professional reputation.

But what if the issue isn't the bug itself, but the way you are scaling? By shifting your workflow from manual hunting to AI-augmented structural refactoring, you turn a chaotic codebase into a scalable, predictable machine. Let's dissect how to reclaim your time and sanity using the industry's most powerful developer agents.

steps.title: Architectural Audit
steps.description: Identify the high-coupling hotspots causing the debugging deadlock.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase for high-coupling modules and circular dependencies. Provide a report on which files are preventing modular testing.
steps.claude_code_command: ls -R | claude ask 'Identify the three most complex modules in this directory based on dependency depth.'

steps.title: Isolation Refactoring
steps.description: Decouple the buggy modules from the core application logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified modules into standalone services with clear interface boundaries to facilitate easier unit testing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Extract the logic in src/auth into a standalone service and update imports accordingly.'

steps.title: Automated Test Synthesis
steps.description: Generate comprehensive test suites for your newly isolated components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of edge-case unit tests for the refactored service, focusing on the previously failing debug paths.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Create jest unit tests for all functions in the new auth-service. Ensure 90% coverage.'

steps.title: Scalability Injection
steps.description: Implement async patterns to handle load and prevent blocking errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Suggest architectural changes to make this service horizontally scalable, focusing on asynchronous request handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Refactor the data processing loop to use async/await patterns to improve performance under load.'

steps.title: Final Verification
steps.description: Run a regression check across the entire system to ensure stability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a final review of the integrated code to ensure no side effects were introduced during scaling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Execute full regression test suite and provide a summary of any remaining performance bottlenecks.'

pro_tips: Always force the AI to explain the 'why' behind a refactor; if it can't explain the logic, it's hallucinating the fix.
Use Claude Code to create a 'context.md' file in your root; it acts as the source of truth for your agent's architectural decisions.
When debugging, ask the agent to write the test case for the bug BEFORE writing the fix to ensure the bug is actually trapped.
Keep your Antigravity analysis logs in a dedicated folder to track how your code structure evolves over the project lifecycle.
If an error persists, swap your agent context to 'Strict Architect' mode to force more conservative, robust code generation.
content.next_steps: Once the refactor is stable, implement a CI/CD pipeline that triggers your new test suite on every push to ensure no regressions occur as you add features.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your own code and start shipping features that scale effortlessly. Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
